title: Institutional Finnish-Inspired Education Audit
description: A diagnostic review of school culture, teaching routines, assessment, learner support, leadership and quality systems.

title: School Leadership Programme
description: A practical leadership programme for owners, principals and middle leaders focused on quality culture and evidence-led improvement.

title: Finnish-Inspired Teacher Development Programme
description: Onsite or online teacher CPD that turns Finnish-inspired principles into classroom routines and evidence-based practice.

title: TVET Curriculum and Competence Demonstration Design
description: A design service for competency-based TVET modules, occupational task mapping, employer scenarios and practical assessment.

title: Curriculum Adaptation Studio for Schools
description: A guided workshop that converts existing textbooks, national curricula or school schemes into practical Finnish-inspired lesson flows.

title: Early Years / SISU-Inspired Preschool Toolkit Workshop
description: A play-based early years workshop with activity cards, home links, observation tools and parent-friendly routines.

title: Assessment for Learning and Evidence Portfolio Workshop
description: A workshop for formative assessment, feedback routines, self-assessment and learner/teacher evidence portfolios.

title: Mixed-Ability Inclusive Classroom Workshop
description: A practical workshop for Support/Core/Extension routes, access scaffolds, dignity and observable learner need.

title: Learning Environment, Play and Movement Workshop
description: A design workshop for active, calm, inclusive and engaging physical or blended learning environments.

title: Digital and Blended CPD Operations Setup
description: A service to configure online modules, video-to-task pages, evidence uploads, certificate rules and admin workflows.

title: Train-the-Trainer Programme
description: A scalable programme preparing local facilitators to deliver FCEI methods with fidelity, evidence and ethical messaging.

title: 90-Day School Improvement Coaching
description: A coached implementation cycle with baseline review, action routines, evidence meetings, progress dashboard and final report.
